name: White Chocolate Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first five ingredients; set aside.
2. In a microwave-safe bowl, heat the chocolate and oil on medium-high for about 2 minutes, stirring once. Then microwave on high for 10 seconds, stir until smooth.
3. Pour the melted chocolate mixture over the cereal mix and mix well.
4. Spread onto three wax paper-lined baking sheets.
5. Allow to cool completely; break apart into pieces.
6. Store in an airtight container.
